title: Vintage Damage Indicators
description: Retro Damage Indicators backport with potion status support and damage particles.
body:
# Vintage Damage Indicators Retro Damage Indicators backport with potion status support and damage particles. ![logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/logo_small.png) [![hub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/badges/github.png)](https://github.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/releases) [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/badges/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vintage-damage-indicators) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/badges/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vintage-damage-indicators) [![67](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/badges/67.png)](https://67.fentanylsolutions.org/mod/vintage-damage-indicators) [![maven](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/badges/maven.png)](https://maven.fentanylsolutions.org/#/releases/org/fentanylsolutions/vintagedamageindicators/VintageDamageIndicators) ![forge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/badges/forge.png) [![cord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/badges/cord.png)](https://discord.gg/xAWCqGrguG) ![golem](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/screenshots/golem.png) ![config](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/screenshots/config.png) Most things are configurable. ## Dependencies * [UniMixins](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins) [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/icons/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unimixins) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/icons/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins/versions) [![git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/icons/git.png)](https://github.com/LegacyModdingMC/UniMixins/releases) * Optional (required for version `0.9.3` and below): [ModularUI2](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/ModularUI2) [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/icons/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modularui) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/icons/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modularui) [![git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/icons/git.png)](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/ModularUI2) ## Building `./gradlew build`. ## Credits * [Retro Damage Indicators](https://github.com/vladmarica/better-ping-display-fabric) (Licensed under [GPLv3](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/retro-damage-indicators#license)) * [GT:NH buildscript](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/ExampleMod1.7.10) ## License `LGPLv3`. ## Buy me some creatine * [ko-fi.com](https://ko-fi.com/jackisasubtlejoke) * Monero: `893tQ56jWt7czBsqAGPq8J5BDnYVCg2tvKpvwTcMY1LS79iDabopdxoUzNLEZtRTH4ewAcKLJ4DM4V41fvrJGHgeKArxwmJ`
![license](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/VintageDamageIndicators/master/images/license_small.png)
